documentation.description:
This package implements functionality defined by ARM D.10.1 to
synchronously release multiple blocked tasks after the number
of blocked tasks has reached a specified threshold.

simple_types.name: Synchronous_Barrier
simple_types.code:
type Synchronous_Barrier (Release_Threshold : Barrier_Limit) is
   limited private;

subtypes.name: Barrier_Limit
subtypes.code: subtype Barrier_Limit is Positive range 1 .. Positive'Last;

subprograms.name: Wait_For_Release
